class.fighter.skill.lunge.name: Lunge
class.fighter.skill.lunge.description:
When wielding a [key.hold_type.two_handed] weapon, you may activate this ability to quickly [key.flavour.important](dash) forwards and strike with [key.variable.positive](+{0:P0}) [key.stat.attack.speed] and [key.variable.positive](+{1:P0})[key.mechanic.damage].
Kills with this ability refresh its [key.flavour.important](cooldown).
class.fighter.skill.second_wind.name: Second Wind
class.fighter.skill.second_wind.descript:
Activate to [key.flavour.positive](heal) [key.variable.positive]({0:N0}) [key.stat.health], [key.flavour.positive](restore) [key.variable.positive]({1:N0}) [key.stat.stamina] and [key.flavour.important](permanently) gain [key.variable.positive]({2:N0}) [key.stat.health.max].
You can only use this ability [key.variable.positive]({3:N0}) times.
class.fighter.skill.cheap_shot.name: Cheap Shot
class.fighter.skill.cheap_shot.descripti:
Perform a quick strike with a [key.hold_type.one_handed] weapon at [key.variable.positive]({0:P0}) [key.stat.attack.speed].
If this hits an enemy while they are [key.flavour.important](attacking), they will take an additional [key.variable.positive]({1:0.#}) [key.mechanic.poise_damage], potentially [key.mechanic.stagger](Staggering) then.
class.fighter.skill.sprint.name: Sprint
class.fighter.skill.action_surge.name: Action Surge
class.fighter.skill.action_surge.descrip:
Gain [key.variable.positive]({0:P0}) [key.stat.attack.speed] and [key.flavour.important](restore) [key.variable.positive]({1:0.#}) [key.stat.stamina] [key.flavour.important](per second) for [key.variable.positive]({2:N1}) [key.flavour.important](seconds).
Has a [key.variable.positive]({3:0.#}) [key.flavour.important](second) [key.flavour.important](cooldown).
class.fighter.skill.like_a_bug.name: Like a Bug
class.fighter.skill.like_a_bug.descripti:
If you would [key.mechanic.posture_break_enemy](Break) an enemies [key.stat.posture] in [key.variable.static](one) hit with a [key.hold_type.two_handed] [key.flag.melee] weapon, [key.flavour.positive](kill them).
[key.flavour.important](Dramatically).
class.fighter.skill.vexation.name: Vexation
class.fighter.skill.vexation.description:
Whenever your [key.hold_type.two_handed] [key.flag.melee] weapon attacks are [key.mechanic.block](Blocked) or [key.mechanic.parry](Parried), you can [key.flavour.important](activate) this skill for the next [key.variable.constant]({0:N1}) [key.flavour.important](seconds.)
[key.trigger.on_activate][key.style.break_small]Instantly perform a melee attack with [key.variable.positive](+{1:P0}) [key.stat.attack.speed] and [key.variable.positive](+{2:P0}) [key.mechanic.damage].
class.fighter.skill.three_pronged_bell.d: After [key.variable.static]({0}) [key.flavour.important](consecutive) [key.mechanic.parry](Parries) with a [key.item_tag.shield] without taking [key.mechanic.damage], your next attack with a [key.item_tag.shield] will deal additional [key.mechanic.damage] equal to [key.variable.positive]({1:P0}) of your [key.stat.defense.armor] [key.variable.positive](({2:N0})).
class.fighter.skill.twin_strike.name: Twin Strike
class.fighter.skill.twin_strike.descript:
While [key.mechanic.dual_wielding] [key.hold_type.one_handed] weapons ([key.item_tag.shield](Shields) excluded), you can [key.flavour.important](activate) this ability.
[key.trigger.on_activate][key.style.break_small]Strike with both weapons at [key.variable.positive](+{0:P0}) [key.stat.attack.speed] and inflict [key.variable.positive]({1:N0}) [key.status.bleed].
class.fighter.skill.dash.name: Dash
class.fighter.skill.dash.description:
[key.flavour.important](Dash) in the direction you're moving.
No cooldown.
[key.flavour.negative](Cannot) be used while wearing [key.item_tag.heavy] or [key.item_tag.medium] [key.item_tag.armor].
class.fighter.skill.shield_counter.name: Counter Bash
class.fighter.skill.shield_counter.descr:
Perform a strike with your [key.item_tag.shield].
Your [key.mechanic.block] will be active during this attack, and will [key.mechanic.parry] any attacks blocked.
